note: Captured with a local GRAPH_API_KEY from user-secrets; the key is not present in fixtures.

queries.pool_state: query($id: ID!) { pool(id: $id) { tick sqrtPrice liquidity feeTier totalValueLockedUSD } }
queries.pool_day_data: query($id: ID!, $days: Int!) { pool(id: $id) { poolDayData(first: $days, orderBy: date, orderDirection: desc) { date volumeUSD } } }
queries.ticks_page: query($pool: String!, $lastTick: BigInt!, $pageSize: Int!) { ticks(first: $pageSize, where: { pool: $pool, tickIdx_gt: $lastTick }, orderBy: tickIdx, orderDirection: asc) { tickIdx liquidityNet liquidityGross } }

supersededIds.reason: Messari schema; query root exposes liquidityPools, not native Uniswap v3 pools.
Messari schema; query root exposes liquidityPools, not native Uniswap v3 pools.

fixtureNotes: ticks_page1.json was captured with pageSize=2 from the adapter start cursor.
ticks_page2.json was captured from the real gateway after the page1 cursor with pageSize=1 so the offline pagination test terminates without recording the entire tick distribution.
